scripts.bootstrap:demo-worker: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build && node --env-file-if-exists=../../.env dist/database/bootstrap-demo-worker.js
scripts.testdata:extended: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build && node --env-file-if-exists=../../.env dist/database/seed-extended-testdata.js
scripts.testdata:extended:clean: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build && node --env-file-if-exists=../../.env dist/database/seed-extended-testdata.js --clean
scripts.testdata:clone-ilya-to-work: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build && node --env-file-if-exists=../../.env dist/database/clone-ilya-to-work.js
scripts.testdata:clone-ilya-to-work:clean: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build && node --env-file-if-exists=../../.env dist/database/clone-ilya-to-work.js --clean
